channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ex-GOP Lawmaker Questions Trump Mobile's Gold Phone Claims and U.S. Manufacturing
item.description: Former Republican Congressman Adam Kinzinger expressed disbelief over the Trump family's new gold smartphone, the T1, marketed under Trump Mobile. Initially advertised as 'Made in USA' and priced at $...

item.title: ICE awarded $12 million contract to company with fabricated staff and misleading claims
item.description: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) awarded a $12.2 million no-bid contract to Edge Ops LLC, a company whose background appears highly questionable, according to investigative reporting by ...

item.title: Christy Lee Rogers Creates Underwater Portraits Evoking Baroque Art
item.description: Photographer Christy Lee Rogers has gained attention for her remarkable underwater photography that resembles classical Baroque paintings. By submerging models in flowing fabrics during nighttime shoo...

item.title: Minister Malatsi appoints expert panel to revise AI policy following errors
item.description: Following a major misstep regarding the draft National Artificial Intelligence Policy, Communications and Digital Technologies Minister Solly Malatsi has formed a panel of independent experts to ensur...

item.title: CBI arrests suspect in NEET-UG 2026 paper leak from Nashik
item.description: Following the alleged leak of the NEET-UG 2026 question paper, the National Testing Agency (NTA) cancelled the examination scheduled for May. On May 12, 2026, Maharashtra Police, acting upon a request...

item.title: Sam Thaiday Explains Why He Can't Pick Sam Walker as Maroons Halfback
item.description: Queensland rugby league legend Sam Thaiday has shared his reservations about selecting Sam Walker as the Maroons' halfback for the upcoming State of Origin series. Thaiday cited concerns over Walker's...

item.title: Macron Highlights France’s Role as Security and Investment Partner in Africa
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron, ahead of the Franco-African summit in Nairobi, emphasised that France and Europe are no longer the historical predators of Africa. He positioned France as a partner o...

item.title: Shaun Halit appointed as interim coach of Bayswater for 2026 EFNL season
item.description: The full news article could not be accessed due to website restrictions, so a detailed summary is unavailable. Based on the title, Shaun Halit has been confirmed as the caretaker coach for Bayswater i...

item.title: Southern Kaduna Priest Freed After Three Months in Captivity
item.description: The Catholic Diocese of Kafanchan for Southern Kaduna don announce say Rev. Fr. Nathaniel Asuwaye don regain him freedom after dem hold am for three months. Fr. Asuwaye na priest wey dem kidnap on Feb...

item.title: Munya Chawawa Explores Trump’s Political Strategy Through Wrestling Satire
item.description: In the documentary 'Wrestling With Trump', comedian and satirist Munya Chawawa examines how Donald Trump’s political style mirrors the spectacle of professional wrestling. Drawing on his lifelong enth...

item.title: Indy 500 Qualifying Format Adjusted for 2026 Race
item.description: The Indianapolis 500 is making minor changes to its qualifying procedure for the 110th Running this year. Traditionally, the Indy 500 uses a unique qualifying format where drivers complete four-lap ru...

item.title: Elections Canada Simplifies Voting for Ridings with Numerous Candidates
item.description: Canada recently faced a peculiar electoral issue known as the 'Long Ballots' problem, where certain ridings could see an overwhelming number of candidates, sometimes exceeding 200 names on a single ba...

item.title: Legal experts confirm Bato Dela Rosa can be arrested despite Senate immunity
item.description: Senator Bato dela Rosa may still face arrest even while the Senate is in session, according to legal experts. Philippine law provides that lawmakers have immunity from arrest during legislative sessio...

item.title: Alex Ekubo Passed Away After Battle With Stage 4 Liver Cancer
item.description: Nollywood actor and filmmaker, Stanley Ajemba, known as Stanley Ontop, don talk say him colleague, Alex Ekubo, don dey fight stage 4 liver cancer since 2024. This one na update wey come after the shoc...

item.title: Study explores how bilingualism and sex hormones influence cognitive resilience and dementia risk
item.description: A recent Canadian study examined how bilingualism, verbal memory, and sex hormones interact to affect brain health and the risk of dementia. With an aging population, Canada faces increasing numbers o...

item.title: Tanzania promotes eco-friendly financing for farmers
item.description: Tanzania government has officially shown support for green farm financing as part of its efforts to boost sustainable agriculture and help farmers cope with climate change impacts. This initiative is ...

item.title: Ex-MCA from Nakuru Found Living on Streets, Community Seeks to Assist
item.description: A sad situation has come to light concerning Margaret Kiiru, a former nominated Member of County Assembly (MCA) from Nakuru County. Once a prominent and influential leader, she is now reported to be l...

item.title: Iran Deploys Small Naval Vessels to Disrupt Shipping in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Following the near-total destruction of Iran's conventional naval fleet by U.S. and Israeli strikes, Tehran has adopted an asymmetrical maritime strategy focused on small, fast-attack vessels known as...

item.title: Dame Joan Collins and Jane Fonda Shine on Red Carpet at 79th Cannes Film Festival
item.description: Dame Joan Collins, aged 92, and Jane Fonda, 88, were the centre of attention at the opening ceremony of the 79th Cannes Film Festival, held at the Palais des Festivals. Joan Collins dazzled in a white...

item.title: Max Air Flight Returns to Abuja After Engine Trouble Shortly After Takeoff
item.description: On Monday, one Max Air Boeing 737-300 aircraft, registration 5N-DAB, wey dey fly from Abuja go Katsina, had to turn back sharply to Nnamdi Azikiwe International Airport after only 15 minutes for air. ...
